title: Microsoft Build 2026 CEO Q&A Interview
description: 微软2026年开发者大会CEO问答访谈，探讨AI与云计算未来

segments.title: Part 1: The Copilot Evolution
segments.text:
Host: Welcome back to our tech daily podcast. Today we are joined by the CEO of Microsoft, Satya Nadella, to discuss the future of AI in enterprise software. Satya, thank you for joining us.

Satya: Thank you for having me. It's great to be here.

segments.title: Part 2: Cloud Infrastructure & AI Scaling
segments.text:
Host: Let's talk about the infrastructure behind these AI capabilities. In 2026, we're seeing unprecedented scale. Can you elaborate on the GPU cluster expansion?

Satya: Absolutely. In 2026, we are looking at scale at an unprecedented level. Our GPU cluster capacity has increased by over 500% compared to 2024. This allows us to serve millions of concurrent requests without latency degradation.

segments.title: Part 3: Developer Productivity
segments.text:
Host: How do you see AI affecting developer productivity in the coming years?

Satya: We've seen a paradigm shift. Developers are now spending less time on boilerplate code and more time on creative problem-solving. Our internal data shows a 40% increase in code deployment frequency.

title: Federal Reserve Interest Rate Decision 2026
description: 美联储2026年利率决议新闻发布会

segments.title: Opening Statement
segments.text: Good afternoon. The Federal Open Market Committee has decided to maintain the target range for the federal funds rate at 5.25% to 5.50%. Our restrictive monetary policy has continued to bring inflation down towards our 2% objective.

jargons.meaning: 美联储公开市场委员会

segments.title: Q&A: Inflation and Labor Market
segments.text:
Journalist: Mr. Chairman, can you comment on the recent rise in unemployment?

Chairman: The labor market remains relatively strong, although we have seen a gradual rebalancing. Our goal is to achieve maximum employment and price stability in tandem.
